div1.entryFree: Castaway, a ruined person: he thence departs a heavy convertite; she there remains a hopeless c. Lucr. 744. and call us wretches, orphans, --s, R3 II, 2, 6. and she whom mighty kingdoms court'sy to, like a forlorn and desperate c., do shameful execution on herself, Tit. V, 3, 75. that ever I should call thee c.! Ant. III, 6, 40.
